verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit injustus ut delinquat in semetipso :  non est timor Dei ante oculos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְאֻֽם־פֶּ֣שַׁע לָ֭רָשָׁע בְּקֶ֣רֶב לִבִּ֑י אֵֽין־פַּ֥חַד אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: The unjust hath said within himself, that he would sin: there is no fear of God before his eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin, Herran palvelian Psalmi, edelläveisaajalle. (H36:2) Se on sydämestäni sanottu jumalattomain menosta: ei he ensinkään Jumalaa pelkää.
verses.king_james: The transgression of the wicked saith within my heart, that there is no fear of God before his eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam dolose egit in conspectu ejus,  ut inveniatur iniquitas ejus ad odium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הֶחֱלִ֣יק אֵלָ֣יו בְּעֵינָ֑יו לִמְצֹ֖א עֲוֺנ֣וֹ לִשְׂנֹֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: For in his sight he hath done deceitfully, that his iniquity may be found unto hatred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän suosittelee itsiänsä silmäinsä edessä, niinkauvan kuin hän löytää pahuutensa, saattaaksensa vihaa matkaan.
verses.king_james: For he flattereth himself in his own eyes, until his iniquity be found to be hateful.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verba oris ejus iniquitas, et dolus ;  noluit intelligere ut bene ageret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דִּבְרֵי־פִ֭יו אָ֣וֶן וּמִרְמָ֑ה חָדַ֖ל לְהַשְׂכִּ֣יל לְהֵיטִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The words of his mouth are iniquity and guile: he would not understand that he might do well.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen suunsa sanat ovat vääryys ja petos; ei hän tahdo enempää ymmärtää, että hän jotakin hyvää tekis,
verses.king_james: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit: he hath left off to be wise, and to do good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iniquitatem meditatus est in cubili suo ;  astitit omni viæ non bonæ :  malitiam autem non odivit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֤וֶן ׀ יַחְשֹׁ֗ב עַֽל־מִשְׁכָּ֫ב֥וֹ יִ֭תְיַצֵּב עַל־דֶּ֣רֶךְ לֹא־ט֑וֹב רָ֝֗ע לֹ֣א יִמְאָֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath devised iniquity on his bed, he hath set himself on every way that is not good: but evil he hath not hated.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ajattelee vuoteessansa vahinkoa, ja pysyy vahvasti pahalla tiellä; ja ei he mitään pahaa hylkää.
verses.king_james: He deviseth mischief upon his bed; he setteth himself in a way that is not good; he abhorreth not evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, in cælo misericordia tua,  et veritas tua usque ad nubes.
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord, thy mercy is in heaven, and thy truth reacheth even to the clouds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, sinun laupiutes ulottuu niin leviältä kuin taivas on, ja sinun totuutes niin avaralta kuin pilvet juoksevat.
verses.king_james: Thy mercy, O Lord, is in the heavens; and thy faithfulness reacheth unto the clouds.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitia tua sicut montes Dei ;  judicia tua abyssus multa.  Homines et jumenta salvabis, Domine,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צִדְקָתְךָ֨ ׀ כְּֽהַרְרֵי־אֵ֗ל מִ֭שְׁפָּטֶיךָ תְּה֣וֹם רַבָּ֑ה אָ֤דָֽם־וּבְהֵמָ֖ה תוֹשִׁ֣יעַ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy justice is as the mountains of God, thy judgments are a great deep. Men and beasts thou wilt preserve, O Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun vanhurskautes on niinkuin Jumalan vuoret, ja sinun oikeutes niinkuin suuri syvyys: Herra, sinä autat sekä ihmiset että eläimet.
verses.king_james: Thy righteousness is like the great mountains; thy judgments are a great deep: O Lord, thou preservest man and beast.

verses.latin_vulgate: quemadmodum multiplicasti misericordiam tuam, Deus.  Filii autem hominum in tegmine alarum tuarum sperabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־יָּקָ֥ר חַסְדְּךָ֗ אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים וּבְנֵ֥י אָדָ֑ם בְּצֵ֥ל כְּ֝נָפֶ֗יךָ יֶחֱסָיֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: O how hast thou multiplied thy mercy, O God! But the children of men shall put their trust under the cover of thy wings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka kallis on sinun hyvyytes, Jumala! että ihmisten lapset sinun siipeis varjon alle uskaltavat.
verses.king_james: How excellent is thy lovingkindness, O God! therefore the children of men put their trust under the shadow of thy wings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inebriabuntur ab ubertate domus tuæ,  et torrente voluptatis tuæ potabis eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭רְוְיֻן מִדֶּ֣שֶׁן בֵּיתֶ֑ךָ וְנַ֖חַל עֲדָנֶ֣יךָ תַשְׁקֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall be inebriated with the plenty of thy house; and thou shalt make them drink of the torrent of thy pleasure.
verses.finnish_biblia: He juopuvat sinun huonees runsaasta tavarasta, ja sinä juotat heitä hekumallas niinkuin virralla.
verses.king_james: They shall be abundantly satisfied with the fatness of thy house; and thou shalt make them drink of the river of thy pleasures.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam apud te est fons vitæ,  et in lumine tuo videbimus lumen.
verses.douay_rheims: For with thee is the fountain of life; and in thy light we shall see light.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun tykönäs on elävä lähde, ja sinun valkeudessas me näemme valkeuden.
verses.king_james: For with thee is the fountain of life: in thy light shall we see light.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prætende misericordiam tuam scientibus te,  et justitiam tuam his qui recto sunt corde.
verses.douay_rheims: Extend thy mercy to them that know thee, and thy justice to them that are right in heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Levitä laupiutes niille, jotka sinun tuntevat, ja sinun vanhurskautes toimellisille.
verses.king_james: O continue thy lovingkindness unto them that know thee; and thy righteousness to the upright in heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non veniat mihi pes superbiæ,  et manus peccatoris non moveat me.
verses.douay_rheims: Let not the foot of pride come to me, and let not the hand of the sinner move me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älä salli minua tallattaa ylpeiltä; ja jumalattomain käsi älköön minua kukistako.
verses.king_james: Let not the foot of pride come against me, and let not the hand of the wicked remove me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi ceciderunt qui operantur iniquitatem ;  expulsi sunt, nec potuerunt stare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣ם נָ֭פְלוּ פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן דֹּ֝ח֗וּ וְלֹא־יָ֥כְלוּ קֽוּם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: There the workers of iniquity are fallen, they are cast out, and could not stand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan anna pahointekiät siihen langeta, että he syöstäisiin pois, ja ei seisoalla pysyisi.
verses.king_james: There are the workers of iniquity fallen: they are cast down, and shall not be able to rise.
